> 
> (1 comment)
> 
> Can you send email to Jessica to tag the latest image as 1.4.0?

Hi, Kiran, 
I saw that in the pom.xml files for artifactbroker and multicloud framework, the versions were already 1.4.0. and could you give me the mail address of Jessica you mentioned. I will talk with her. Thanks.
